title: High Molecular Weight DNA Extraction from Actinomycetota
author: Ashley Paulsen

steps.title: Grow cultures shaking in half strength TSB with 0
steps.instruction: Grow cultures shaking in half strength TSB with 0.5% glycine for 36-48 hours.

steps.title: Spin down at 4500 x g...
steps.instruction: Spin down at 4500 x g for 10 minutes, remove supernatant 4500 x g, Room temperature, 10 minutes

steps.title: Wash cells by re-suspending in 500...
steps.instruction: Wash cells by re-suspending in 500 µL of PBS, centrifuging, and removing the supernatant 500 µL 1X PBS (Phosphate-buffered saline ) At this point the cells can be frozen and stored at -80 °C if needed

steps.title: Re-suspend in 200 µL 1X PBS (Phosphate-buffered saline )
steps.instruction: Re-suspend in 200 µL 1X PBS (Phosphate-buffered saline )

steps.title: Vortex with 5 mL of sucrose...
steps.instruction: Vortex with 5 mL of sucrose lysis buffer and incubate at 37 °C for 01:00:00 5 mL, Sucrose Lysis Buffer

steps.title: Add 500 µL of 10% SDS...
steps.instruction: Add 500 µL of 10% SDS (for a final concentration of 1%) and 50 µL Proteinase K Life Technologies Catalog #17916 (20 mg/mL stock solution). Mix by rotating the tube end over end 5 times.

steps.title: Incubate at 50 °C for 02:00:00...
steps.instruction: Incubate at 50 °C for 02:00:00 , mix every 30 minutes by slowly rotating end-over-end 3 times.

steps.title: Pour the viscous lysate into fresh...
steps.instruction: Pour the viscous lysate into fresh 15 mL conical centrifuge tubes

steps.title: Add 5 mL recently opened BioUltra...
steps.instruction: Add 5 mL recently opened BioUltra Phenol to each Falcon tube containing lysate. BioUltra TE-saturated phenol Merck MilliporeSigma (Sigma-Aldrich) Catalog #77607 (CAS: 108-95-2) buffer saturated phenol is preferable as the pH is around 8.0 Phenol should be used with 3 months of opening for optimum results

steps.title: Place on a mixer at ~20...
steps.instruction: Place on a mixer at ~20 rpm end-over-end rotation for 10 minutes, if a fine emulsion has not formed after a minute gradually increase the rotation speed. A HulaMixer is recommended, but a hematology mixer can be used instead.

steps.title: Due to the sucrose, the aqueous...
steps.instruction: Due to the sucrose, the aqueous phase will migrate below the organic. Pipette off the organic phase and discard it, removing as much as possible without removing too much of the aqueous phase. Protein may show as a white precipitate and should be removed as much as possible.

steps.title: Spin in a centrifuge at 6000 rpm for 10 minutes
steps.instruction: Spin in a centrifuge at 6000 rpm for 10 minutes. 6000 rpm, Room temperature, 10 minutes

steps.title: Pour the aqueous phases into new...
steps.instruction: Pour the aqueous phases into new 15 ml Falcon tubes and add 2.5 mL of phenol and 2.5 mL of 24:1 chloroform-isoamyl alcohol to each. BioUltra TE-saturated phenol Merck MilliporeSigma (Sigma-Aldrich) Catalog #77607 (CAS: 108-95-2) BioUltra Chloroform – isoamyl alcohol mixture 24:1 Supelco Catalog #25666

steps.title: Place on a mixer at ~20...
steps.instruction: Place on a mixer at ~20 rpm end-over-end rotation for 10 minutes, if a fine emulsion has not formed after a minute gradually increase the rotation speed.

steps.title: Centrifuge at 6000 rpm for 10 minutes
steps.instruction: Centrifuge at 6000 rpm for 10 minutes. 6000 rpm, Room temperature, 10 minutes

steps.title: Pipette off the organic phase and...
steps.instruction: Pipette off the organic phase and discard it, removing as much as possible without removing too much of the aqueous phase.

steps.title: Centrifuge at 6000 rpm for 5...
steps.instruction: Centrifuge at 6000 rpm for 5 minutes and ensure complete removal of the organic phase. 6000 rpm, Room temperature, 10 minutes

steps.title: Pour aqueous phase into a new...
steps.instruction: Pour aqueous phase into a new 50 mL conical centrifuge tube.

steps.title: Add 2 mL of cold 5M ammonium acetate
steps.instruction: Add 2 mL of cold 5M ammonium acetate. Gently rock the tube back and forth3 times to mix. ammonium acetate P212121 Ammonium acetate solution should be used within a week of preparing, the fresher the better.

steps.title: Add 15 mL ice-cold 100% ethanol...
steps.instruction: Add 15 mL ice-cold 100% ethanol and incubate tubes in 4 °C Overnight to maximize precipitation. Chill the ethanol before hand

steps.title: Melt the tip of a glass...
steps.instruction: Melt the tip of a glass pipet in a bunsen burner to make a small hook

steps.title: Hook out the mass of precipitated...
steps.instruction: Hook out the mass of precipitated DNA and dip it into a container 70% ethanol. Try to get it in one piece, but if it breaks then you can just go back for the rest. Gently work the mass off of the hook and into a labeled microcentrifuge tube

steps.title: Add 1 mL 70% ethanol to the tube
steps.instruction: Add 1 mL 70% ethanol to the tube

steps.title: Spin down at 10,000 x g...
steps.instruction: Spin down at 10,000 x g for 2 min then remove as much of the 70% ethanol as possible 10000 x g, °C, 2 minutes

steps.title: Wash again with 1 mL 70% ethanol
steps.instruction: Wash again with 1 mL 70% ethanol

steps.title: Spin down at 10,000 x g...
steps.instruction: Spin down at 10,000 x g for 2 min then remove as much of the 70% ethanol as possible 10000 x g, °C, 2 minutes

steps.title: Let the remaining ethanol evaporate by...
steps.instruction: Let the remaining ethanol evaporate by leaving at room temperature for 15 minutes. Leaving the tubes on their side in a laminar flow hood speeds this up significantly.

steps.title: Add 500 µL 10 mM Tris...
steps.instruction: Add 500 µL 10 mM Tris elution buffer and incubate without mixing at 4 °C for 24:00:00 to allow the pellet to fully re-suspend into a translucent viscous gel. 10 mM Tris-HCL pH 8.0 Contributed by users This can be decreased if the pellet is small. It’s important that freshly eluted HMW DNA is given time to relax before being handled and 4°C facilitates this relaxing.

steps.title: 1) Slowly pipette mix DNA 5-10...
steps.instruction: 1) Slowly pipette mix DNA 5-10 times with wide bore pipette (or a cut p200)

steps.title: 2) Incubate on 37 °C heating block 30-60 minutes
steps.instruction: 2) Incubate on 37 °C heating block 30-60 minutes

steps.title: 3) Slowly pipette mix 5-10 times with wide bore pipette
steps.instruction: 3) Slowly pipette mix 5-10 times with wide bore pipette

steps.title: 4) Perform nanodrop in triplicate; bottom,...
steps.instruction: 4) Perform nanodrop in triplicate; bottom, middle, top (I always use this order just for consistency) If the readings are too different then repeat the homogenization.

steps.title: 5) Once nanodrop readings are consistent...
steps.instruction: 5) Once nanodrop readings are consistent the DNA is ready for Qubit and intended uses

steps.title: Take an aliquot of DNA and...
steps.instruction: Take an aliquot of DNA and add to a clean 1.5 mL micro centrifuge tube. Add an equal volume of precipitation buffer and gently flick to mix.

steps.title: Add 1 mL of 70% ethanol...
steps.instruction: Add 1 mL of 70% ethanol and gently tap to mix

steps.title: Incubate sample at Room temperature for 6-18 hours
steps.instruction: Incubate sample at Room temperature for 6-18 hours. Longer incubation times increases recovery.

steps.title: Centrifuge for 15 minutes at 10,000...
steps.instruction: Centrifuge for 15 minutes at 10,000 g 10000 rpm, °C, 15 minutes

steps.title: Pipette off supernatant, being VERY careful...
steps.instruction: Pipette off supernatant, being VERY careful not to disturb the pellet Pipette slowly, keeping tip at the liquid-air interface Leave 10-20 µL behind

steps.title: Centrifuge for 2 minutes at 10,000...
steps.instruction: Centrifuge for 2 minutes at 10,000 g 10000 x g, °C, 2 minutes

steps.title: Pipette off and discard supernatant
steps.instruction: Pipette off and discard supernatant. The pellet should be slightly more secure at this point, but care should still be taken not to disturb it.

steps.title: Repeat the ethanol wash and let...
steps.instruction: Repeat the ethanol wash and let pellet dry for ~15 minutes.

steps.title: Add desired volume of 10 mM...
steps.instruction: Add desired volume of 10 mM Tris elution buffer and incubate at 4 °C 10 mM Tris-HCL pH 8.0 Contributed by users
